query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, COUNT(p.id) as places_count, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM island_guides ig WHERE ig.atoll = a.name AND ig.contentType = 'island') as guides_count
FROM atolls a
LEFT JOIN places p ON a.id = p.atollId AND p.type = 'island'
GROUP BY a.id, a.name
ORDER BY a.name;

LEFT JOIN places p ON a.id = p.atollId AND p.type = 'island'
